source.body_text_sample:
See our 2025 Impact! 
Our Programs
 
About Us
 
Our Story
 
Get Involved
 
Sign Up
 DONATE
Raise funds and awareness for War Child

Get Involved

Partnerships

Partner with us

War Child’s corporate partners are critical to our success in supporting children and their families recovering from war.

We’re always looking for new partnership opportunities. If your organization has an idea for a campaign or event, or is exploring ways you might support War Child, we’d love to hear from you.

CONTACT US

Support from celebrity changemakers is key to our ongoing success. Their dedication enables us to raise awareness and funds and we are honoured to have their commitment and endorsement.

We’re incredibly grateful for the support of Alicia Keys, Chantal Kreviazuk, Raine Maida, Sarah McLachlan, Mustafa the Poet, Thomas Sadoski, Amanda Seyfried, Billy Talent, Pearl Jam, Sam Roberts Band, Simple Plan, and Sum 41.

Our team is brought together through a shared purpose

Work With Us

To explore our current job opportunities, please visit the jobs section on our LinkedIn page.

Start a Student Club or Host an Event!
